category.scope_note: Hand-held, transportable, and corded or cordless electric power tools of China origin assessed for placement on the Zimbabwe market under SAZ/ZWS standards (adopting IEC/SANS), national conformity and import inspection, POTRAZ radio type-approval for cordless wireless functions, and the NSSA occupational framework.

title.en: China-to-Zimbabwe Power Tool Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动工具进入津巴布韦：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動工具進入辛巴威：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China power-tool compliance against Zimbabwe SAZ/ZWS electrical safety, EMC, market access, noise, restricted-substance, and cordless-battery requirements.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动工具合规与津巴布韦 SAZ/ZWS 电气安全、电磁兼容、市场准入、噪声、限用物质及无绳电池要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動工具合規與辛巴威 SAZ/ZWS 電氣安全、電磁相容、市場准入、噪聲、限用物質及無繩電池要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment-body assessment, customs determination, market-access approval, or product-safety design review. Exporters and importers should verify current Zimbabwe law, SAZ/ZWS adopted standards, import inspection practice, POTRAZ type-approval, and enforcement practice with qualified professionals before shipment.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构评审、海关裁定、市场准入批准或产品安全设计评审。出口商和进口商在出货前应与合格专业人士核验现行津巴布韦法律、SAZ/ZWS 采纳标准、进口检验实践、POTRAZ 型号核准及执法实践。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構評審、海關裁定、市場准入批准或產品安全設計評審。出口商和進口商在出貨前應與合格專業人士核驗現行辛巴威法律、SAZ/ZWS 採納標準、進口檢驗實務、POTRAZ 型號核准及執法實務。

answer_first.en: For China-made electric or cordless power tools entering Zimbabwe, the baseline is SAZ/ZWS standards that adopt IEC 62841 (with SANS alignment), national conformity and import inspection, and POTRAZ type-approval for cordless tools with radio functions; the grid is 230 V, 50 Hz, so the 50 Hz frequency matches China but the voltage differs from China 220/380 V. Zimbabwe has no EU-style outdoor-noise product marking regime, so noise is handled as occupational and adopted-standard guidance rather than a separate product mark.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造的有线或无绳电动工具进入津巴布韦，基线是采纳 IEC 62841（并与 SANS 对齐）的 SAZ/ZWS 标准、国家符合性与进口检验，以及对带无线功能的无绳工具进行 POTRAZ 型号核准；电网为 230 V、50 Hz，因此频率与中国相同，但电压不同于中国 220/380 V。津巴布韦没有欧盟式的户外噪声产品标识制度，因此噪声按职业与采纳标准指引处理，而非单独的产品标识。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造的有線或無繩電動工具進入辛巴威，基線是採納 IEC 62841（並與 SANS 對齊）的 SAZ/ZWS 標準、國家符合性與進口檢驗，以及對帶無線功能的無繩工具進行 POTRAZ 型號核准；電網為 230 V、50 Hz，因此頻率與中國相同，但電壓不同於中國 220/380 V。辛巴威沒有歐盟式的戶外噪聲產品標識制度，因此噪聲按職業與採納標準指引處理，而非單獨的產品標識。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Quarterly, or on change of Zimbabwe SAZ/ZWS adopted standards, import-inspection practice, or POTRAZ type-approval rules
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set true. Official regulator, standards body, conformity-assessment body, customs, or primary legal sources are preferred; local PDFs are not accepted.
